  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans two main areas:\n\n**1. Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes, checks if ILM is enabled, and invokes the `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. It is triggered both on master election (for async action steps) and on cluster state updates (for cluster state action/wait steps).\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates the execution of individual lifecycle steps. It dispatches to the appropriate execution path depending on step type: `ClusterStateActionStep`, `ClusterStateWaitStep`, `AsyncActionStep`, or `AsyncWaitStep`.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Handles transitions between steps and phases in the lifecycle state machine.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): A cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously within a cluster state update.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates the cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step when a step fails.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a registry of compiled step lists for each policy, keyed by policy name and version.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin class registering ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for ILM cluster state update tasks.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleFeatures** (`IndexLifecycleFeatures.java`): Defines ILM feature metadata for the features API.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles reserved state (file-based) ILM policy management.\n\n**2. Transport Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction** (`TransportPutLifecycleAction.java`): Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` objects into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (`TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java`): Handles DELETE policy requests.\n\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport action handlers for various ILM operations.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction** (`ReservedLifecycleAction.java`): Reserved cluster state handler that applies ILM policies from configuration files.\n\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService** (`MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService.java`): Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model class representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps with a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications (e.g., `InitializePolicyContextStep`, `GenerateUniqueIndexNameStep`, `CopySettingsStep`).\n\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform asynchronous actions against the cluster (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`, `DownsampleStep`).\n\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that asynchronously poll a condition (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in index metadata (custom metadata map), tracks the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure information for each ILM-managed index."
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans several modules:\n\n**1. Core Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes and master elections, then invokes `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. On master election it runs `AsyncActionStep` steps; on cluster state changes it runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps, and schedules periodic polling for `AsyncWaitStep` steps.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates execution of individual lifecycle steps, dispatching to the correct execution path based on step type.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Manages transitions between steps and phases.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin registration class for all ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for cluster state update tasks used by ILM.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): Cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step on failure.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info stored in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a compiled cache of step lists per policy.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM status.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles file-based reserved cluster state ILM policies.\n\n**2. Transport & REST Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction**: Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction**: Handles DELETE policy requests.\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport handlers for ILM operations.\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction**: Reserved state handler that uses `TransportPutLifecycleAction` and `TransportDeleteLifecycleAction` internally.\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService**: Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps, identified by a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications.\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps performing asynchronous transport actions (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`).\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that periodically poll a condition asynchronously (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in each index's custom metadata, tracking the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure details for each ILM-managed index."
}

Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes, checks if ILM is enabled, and invokes the `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. It is triggered both on master election (for async action steps) and on cluster state updates (for cluster state action/wait steps).\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates the execution of individual lifecycle steps. It dispatches to the appropriate execution path depending on step type: `ClusterStateActionStep`, `ClusterStateWaitStep`, `AsyncActionStep`, or `AsyncWaitStep`.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Handles transitions between steps and phases in the lifecycle state machine.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): A cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously within a cluster state update.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates the cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step when a step fails.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a registry of compiled step lists for each policy, keyed by policy name and version.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin class registering ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for ILM cluster state update tasks.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleFeatures** (`IndexLifecycleFeatures.java`): Defines ILM feature metadata for the features API.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles reserved state (file-based) ILM policy management.\n\n**2. Transport Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction** (`TransportPutLifecycleAction.java`): Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` objects into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (`TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java`): Handles DELETE policy requests.\n\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport action handlers for various ILM operations.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction** (`ReservedLifecycleAction.java`): Reserved cluster state handler that applies ILM policies from configuration files.\n\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService** (`MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService.java`): Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model class representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps with a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications (e.g., `InitializePolicyContextStep`, `GenerateUniqueIndexNameStep`, `CopySettingsStep`).\n\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform asynchronous actions against the cluster (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`, `DownsampleStep`).\n\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that asynchronously poll a condition (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in index metadata (custom metadata map), tracks the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure information for each ILM-managed index."
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans two main areas:\n\n**1. Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes, checks if ILM is enabled, and invokes the `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. It is triggered both on master election (for async action steps) and on cluster state updates (for cluster state action/wait steps).\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates the execution of individual lifecycle steps. It dispatches to the appropriate execution path depending on step type: `ClusterStateActionStep`, `ClusterStateWaitStep`, `AsyncActionStep`, or `AsyncWaitStep`.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Handles transitions between steps and phases in the lifecycle state machine.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): A cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously within a cluster state update.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates the cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step when a step fails.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a registry of compiled step lists for each policy, keyed by policy name and version.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin class registering ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for ILM cluster state update tasks.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleFeatures** (`IndexLifecycleFeatures.java`): Defines ILM feature metadata for the features API.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles reserved state (file-based) ILM policy management.\n\n**2. Transport Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction** (`TransportPutLifecycleAction.java`): Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` objects into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (`TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java`): Handles DELETE policy requests.\n\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport action handlers for various ILM operations.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction** (`ReservedLifecycleAction.java`): Reserved cluster state handler that applies ILM policies from configuration files.\n\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService** (`MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService.java`): Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model class representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps with a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications (e.g., `InitializePolicyContextStep`, `GenerateUniqueIndexNameStep`, `CopySettingsStep`).\n\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform asynchronous actions against the cluster (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`, `DownsampleStep`).\n\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that asynchronously poll a condition (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in index metadata (custom metadata map), tracks the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure information for each ILM-managed index."
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans several modules:\n\n**1. Core Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes and master elections, then invokes `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. On master election it runs `AsyncActionStep` steps; on cluster state changes it runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps, and schedules periodic polling for `AsyncWaitStep` steps.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates execution of individual lifecycle steps, dispatching to the correct execution path based on step type.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Manages transitions between steps and phases.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin registration class for all ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for cluster state update tasks used by ILM.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): Cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step on failure.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info stored in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a compiled cache of step lists per policy.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM status.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles file-based reserved cluster state ILM policies.\n\n**2. Transport & REST Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction**: Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction**: Handles DELETE policy requests.\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport handlers for ILM operations.\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction**: Reserved state handler that uses `TransportPutLifecycleAction` and `TransportDeleteLifecycleAction` internally.\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService**: Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps, identified by a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications.\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps performing asynchronous transport actions (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`).\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that periodically poll a condition asynchronously (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in each index's custom metadata, tracking the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure details for each ILM-managed index."
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans several modules:\n\n**1. Core Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes and master elections, then invokes `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. On master election it runs `AsyncActionStep` steps; on cluster state changes it runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps, and schedules periodic polling for `AsyncWaitStep` steps.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates execution of individual lifecycle steps, dispatching to the correct execution path based on step type.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Manages transitions between steps and phases.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin registration class for all ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for cluster state update tasks used by ILM.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): Cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step on failure.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info stored in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a compiled cache of step lists per policy.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM status.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles file-based reserved cluster state ILM policies.\n\n**2. Transport & REST Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction**: Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction**: Handles DELETE policy requests.\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport handlers for ILM operations.\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction**: Reserved state handler that uses `TransportPutLifecycleAction` and `TransportDeleteLifecycleAction` internally.\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService**: Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps, identified by a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications.\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps performing asynchronous transport actions (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`).\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that periodically poll a condition asynchronously (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in each index's custom metadata, tracking the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure details for each ILM-managed index."
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) implementation spans several modules:\n\n**1. Core Service & Policy Evaluation (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/)**\n\n- **IndexLifecycleService** (`IndexLifecycleService.java`): The central service that triggers policy evaluation. It listens to cluster state changes and master elections, then invokes `IndexLifecycleRunner` to run policy steps for each managed index. On master election it runs `AsyncActionStep` steps; on cluster state changes it runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps, and schedules periodic polling for `AsyncWaitStep` steps.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleRunner** (`IndexLifecycleRunner.java`): Orchestrates execution of individual lifecycle steps, dispatching to the correct execution path based on step type.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleTransition** (`IndexLifecycleTransition.java`): Manages transitions between steps and phases.\n\n- **IndexLifecycle** (`IndexLifecycle.java`): The X-Pack plugin registration class for all ILM components.\n\n- **IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask** (`IndexLifecycleClusterStateUpdateTask.java`): Base class for cluster state update tasks used by ILM.\n\n- **ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** (`ExecuteStepsUpdateTask.java`): Cluster state update task that runs `ClusterStateActionStep` and `ClusterStateWaitStep` steps synchronously.\n\n- **MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToNextStepUpdateTask.java`): Updates cluster state to advance an index to the next step.\n\n- **MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** (`MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask.java`): Moves an index into the ILM error step on failure.\n\n- **SetStepInfoUpdateTask** (`SetStepInfoUpdateTask.java`): Updates step info stored in index metadata.\n\n- **PolicyStepsRegistry** (`PolicyStepsRegistry.java`): Maintains a compiled cache of step lists per policy.\n\n- **IlmHealthIndicatorService** (`IlmHealthIndicatorService.java`): Health API integration for ILM status.\n\n- **ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider** (`ReservedLifecycleStateHandlerProvider.java`): Handles file-based reserved cluster state ILM policies.\n\n**2. Transport & REST Action Handlers (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/)**\n\n- **TransportPutLifecycleAction**: Handles PUT policy requests, storing `LifecyclePolicy` into cluster state via `IndexLifecycleMetadata`.\n- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction**: Handles DELETE policy requests.\n- **TransportGetLifecycleAction**, **TransportExplainLifecycleAction**, **TransportGetStatusAction**, **TransportMigrateToDataTiersAction**, **TransportMoveToStepAction**, **TransportRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction**, **TransportRetryAction**, **TransportStartILMAction**, **TransportStopILMAction**: Additional transport handlers for ILM operations.\n- **ReservedLifecycleAction**: Reserved state handler that uses `TransportPutLifecycleAction` and `TransportDeleteLifecycleAction` internally.\n- REST handlers: `RestPutLifecycleAction`, `RestDeleteLifecycleAction`, `RestGetLifecycleAction`, `RestExplainLifecycleAction`, `RestGetStatusAction`, `RestMigrateToDataTiersAction`, `RestMoveToStepAction`, `RestRemoveIndexLifecyclePolicyAction`, `RestRetryAction`, `RestStartILMAction`, `RestStopAction`.\n\n**3. ILM History (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/history/)**\n\n- **ILMHistoryStore**, **ILMHistoryItem**, **ILMHistoryTemplateRegistry**: Record ILM step execution history to the `.ilm-history-*` index.\n\n**4. Cluster Metadata Helper (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **MetadataMigrateToDataTiersRoutingService**: Logic for migrating index/data stream allocation to data tiers.\n\n**5. Model Classes & Step Framework (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/)**\n\n- **LifecyclePolicy** (`LifecyclePolicy.java`): Top-level model representing a named ILM policy composed of named `Phase` objects.\n- **Phase** (`Phase.java`): Represents a lifecycle phase (hot, warm, cold, frozen, delete) with a minimum age and a set of `LifecycleAction` objects.\n- **Step** (`Step.java`): Base class for all lifecycle steps, identified by a `StepKey` (phase/action/name triple).\n- **ClusterStateActionStep** (`ClusterStateActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that perform synchronous cluster state modifications.\n- **ClusterStateWaitStep** (`ClusterStateWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that check a condition synchronously against cluster state.\n- **AsyncActionStep** (`AsyncActionStep.java`): Abstract base for steps performing asynchronous transport actions (e.g., `ShrinkStep`, `RolloverStep`, `ForceMergeStep`).\n- **AsyncWaitStep** (`AsyncWaitStep.java`): Abstract base for steps that periodically poll a condition asynchronously (e.g., `WaitForRolloverReadyStep`, `WaitForSnapshotStep`, `SegmentCountStep`).\n\n**6. LifecycleExecutionState (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/)**\n\n- **LifecycleExecutionState** (`LifecycleExecutionState.java`): Stored in each index's custom metadata, tracking the current lifecycle step (phase, action, step names), step start times, phase definition cache, and failure details for each ILM-managed index."
